description_long: This object is a stylized tombstone with a multi-tiered rectangular base and a rounded top. The front face features engraved text referencing the popular Minecraft meme, with phrases such as 'CREEPER AWW MAN' and 'So We Back In The Mine.' The lower section of the tombstone is partially open, revealing a pixelated green face reminiscent of a Minecraft Creeper inside. The structure appears to be made primarily of gray stone or concrete, with the interior Creeper figure constructed from colored blocks. The surface is matte and hard, with visible engraved lettering and a playful, blocky aesthetic. The overall design is whimsical and references gaming culture, making it a unique grave marker.
description: A gray, multi-tiered tombstone with engraved meme text and a pixelated Creeper face inside a partially open base.
description_view_0: The front view shows the engraved text and the Creeper face clearly visible inside the open lower section.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the tombstone and a partial view of the Creeper face inside.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the plain back of the tombstone with no visible text or Creeper face.
description_view_3: The right side view displays the layered structure and a slanted perspective of the engraved text and open base.
attribute_tombstone_inscriptions: So We Back In The Mine
Got Our Pickaxe Swinging From Side To Side
